# FINALIZE_OPERATIONAL_GOVERNED_INTERACTION_RUNTIME_V1

## Status

Frozen and certified.

This milestone closes the first operational governed interaction runtime epoch:

`human -> browser companion -> localhost preview runtime -> governed invocation chain -> deterministic governed response -> replay-visible evidence`

It also certifies the MCP-compatible relay topology:

`ChatGPT-style structured invocation -> MCP wrapper / live MCP host -> governed bridge -> localhost preview runtime -> governed response`

## Finalized Components

1. governed localhost preview runtime
2. governed operator CLI
3. governed ChatGPT bridge
4. governed MCP wrapper
5. live MCP host entrypoint
6. governed browser companion
7. governed intent interpretation layer

## Certification

- operational interaction stack completeness: certified
- browser companion ingress behavior: certified
- governed natural-language interpretation boundary: certified
- explicit preview and human confirmation semantics: certified
- localhost-only runtime topology: certified
- replay-visible invocation evidence: certified
- fail-closed invalid-input behavior: certified
- hidden execution introduced: false
- autonomous continuation introduced: false

## Explicit Exclusions

- Codex task synthesis
- autonomous Codex execution
- general natural-language execution
- automatic prompt-to-tool execution
- hidden planning
- orchestration
- remote public execution authority

## Closure Statement

This operational interaction epoch is closed. Future work such as
`GOVERNED_CODEX_TASK_SYNTHESIS_V1` must build on this finalized baseline and
must not mutate it implicitly.
